title: O.R.I.O.N
domain: AI-Driven Retail Intelligence | Demand Forecasting | Inventory Management
description: Integrated AI-driven inventory management and demand forecasting platform creating a closed-loop intelligence network between household consumption and retail stock management.
overview: O.R.I.O.N. is an integrated AI-driven inventory management and demand forecasting platform that creates a closed-loop intelligence network between household consumption and retail stock management. Unlike traditional systems that react only to sales history, O.R.I.O.N. models the causal driver: recipe-based household consumption → inventory depletion → replenishment behavior → store demand signals.

features.label: Bidirectional Consumer–Retailer Intelligence
features.description: Household cooking logs and depletion predictions inform store-side forecasting. Closed-loop optimization.

features.label: Predictive Auto-Restock
features.description: Forecasts item-level demand, suggests restock quantities and timing. Proactive alerts before stockouts.

features.label: Cultural-Aware Forecasting (Festival Peaks)
features.description: Uses Diwali, Holi, etc. as structured seasonality markers. Critical for Indian retail.

features.label: Customer Persona Segmentation
features.description: Segments into budget, premium, regular, festival-driven personas for targeted recommendations.

features.label: Hyper-Personalized Recommendations
features.description: Collaborative filtering based on similar shoppers for product and recipe suggestions.

features.label: Anomaly Detection for Demand Spikes
features.description: Isolation Forest detects flash-demand and bulk-buy anomalies, triggers early restock alerts.

features.label: CI/CD Monthly Retraining
features.description: Automated scheduled retraining on the 1st of every month.

algorithms.name: Prophet (Time-Series Forecasting)
algorithms.description: Primary forecasting: strong seasonality/festival effects with confidence intervals.

algorithms.name: ARIMA (Fallback)
algorithms.description: Sparse/low-signal product history when Prophet confidence intervals exceed stability.

algorithms.name: KNN + Cosine Similarity
algorithms.description: Recommendation system finding similar users for product/recipe recommendations.

algorithms.name: K-Means + PCA
algorithms.description: Customer segmentation with behavioral feature clustering and 2D visualization.

algorithms.name: Isolation Forest
algorithms.description: Demand spike and bulk-buying anomaly detection with proactive restock alerts.

modules.name: Simulation / Data Factory
modules.responsibility: Multi-year realistic purchase + consumption history via recipe-based household drain simulation

modules.name: Store Front Module
modules.responsibility: POS logging, real-time inventory deduction, restock dashboard, analytics

modules.name: User Front Module
modules.responsibility: Cooking logs, depletion prediction, personalized shopping lists

modules.name: ML Pipeline
modules.responsibility: Data fetching, feature engineering, StandardScaler, model training, inference

modules.name: Central Orchestration
modules.responsibility: Distributed scheduling, performance monitoring, retraining decisions

results: Full-stack retail intelligence platform with bidirectional household–store data flow
Multi-model demand forecasting with festival-aware seasonality
Containerized, fault-tolerant ML architecture with monthly retraining
